Reserve Your Table

Join us for an unforgettable dining experience. Book your table and let us take care of the rest.

Booking Details

By making a reservation, you agree to our cancellation policy.

Opening Hours

Monday - Thursday11:00 AM - 10:00 PM
Friday - Sunday11:00 AM - 11:00 PM

Reservation Policy

  • • Reservations are held for 15 minutes past the booking time
  • • For parties larger than 10, please call us directly
  • • Cancellations must be made at least 2 hours in advance
  • • Special dietary requirements can be accommodated with advance notice

Kitchen

Experience the authentic flavors of Nepal with a modern twist. Premium Thakali cuisine crafted with love and tradition.
